name: Toasted English Muffins with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 6 English muffins cut in half and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the grated cheddar cheese, mayonnaise, curry powder, chopped green olives, and chopped green onion together.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the toasted English muffin halves.
3. Place the assembled muffins in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes until heated through.
This is a really nice appetizer!
